policy.source_of_truth: Claude files remain the human source where possible, but Codex has explicit ports where syntax or discovery differs.
policy.maintenance: When one side changes, the active agent must update the counterpart in the same session. Hooks remind immediately and block one-sided commits unless the changed artifact is synchronized or this manifest records an explicit artifact-specific status or exemption.

instructions.note: Codex reads global user instructions from AGENTS.md in $CODEX_HOME; project_doc_fallback_filenames applies to project docs, not $CODEX_HOME.

skills.name: move-session-log
skills.note: Claude Code and Codex store session logs in different locations and formats. The Claude skill operates on ~/.claude/projects plus ~/.claude/history.jsonl and ~/.claude.json; the Codex skill operates on ~/.codex/sessions plus Codex history/index files.

hooks.name: block-destructive-command.sh
hooks.note: ported; Claude ask decisions become deny-with-user-confirmation instructions; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: block-elpaca-dotfiles-edit.sh
hooks.note: ported for apply_patch/Edit/Write path guards

hooks.name: block-elpaca-rebuild-uncommitted.sh
hooks.note: ported for Bash emacsclient guard; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: block-secret-leak.sh
hooks.note: ported; Codex version scans Bash and apply_patch payloads; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: block-sensitive-read.sh
hooks.note: Claude Read hook; Codex currently has no equivalent read-file hook registration in this setup.

hooks.name: block-texi-edit.sh
hooks.note: ported for apply_patch/Edit/Write path guards

hooks.name: block-walk-list-access.sh
hooks.note: ported; Codex version scans Bash and apply_patch paths; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: check-chrome-profile-pair.sh
hooks.note: Claude Chrome SessionStart no-op placeholder; not relevant to Codex.

hooks.name: elpaca-run.sh
hooks.note: Claude Emacs hook utility; Codex uses codex/hooks/notify-emacs-hook.sh instead.

hooks.name: fire-and-forget.sh
hooks.note: Copied for utility parity; current Codex registration uses notify-emacs-hook.sh directly.

hooks.name: guard-external-actions.sh
hooks.note: ported for MCP tool names

hooks.name: lib-codex-hook-json.sh
hooks.note: Codex hook payload normalizer for tool_input/tool_response object-or-string variants; Claude hooks read native Claude payloads directly.

hooks.name: lib-codex-paths.sh
hooks.note: Codex apply_patch path extraction helper; uses lib-codex-hook-json.sh for object-or-string payload normalization.

hooks.name: lib-repo-root.sh
hooks.note: Shared repo-root helper copied for hooks that need command-context git roots; Codex usage comment references lib-codex-hook-json.sh.

hooks.name: lib-staged-files.sh
hooks.note: Shared staged-file helper copied for commit gates; Codex usage comment references lib-codex-hook-json.sh.

hooks.name: load-elisp-after-edit.sh
hooks.note: ported for apply_patch/Edit/Write path lists; Codex PostToolUse output must include hookEventName and use additionalContext rather than Claude's message field

hooks.name: notify-emacs-hook.sh
hooks.note: Codex-side Emacs event bridge for Stop and SessionStart.

hooks.name: notify-emacs-notification.sh
hooks.note: Claude Notification event; Codex notification handling uses codex/hooks/notify-emacs-hook.sh.

hooks.name: notify-emacs-session-end.sh
hooks.note: Claude Stop event wrapper; Codex uses codex/hooks/notify-emacs-hook.sh.

hooks.name: regenerate-manual-after-edit.sh
hooks.note: ported for apply_patch/Edit/Write path lists; Codex PostToolUse output must include hookEventName and use additionalContext rather than Claude's message field

hooks.name: remind-ai-config-sync.sh
hooks.note: ported as paired Claude/Codex wrappers around bin/ai-config-sync

hooks.name: remind-claude-readme-update.sh
hooks.note: ported for Codex apply_patch/Edit/Write path lists; Codex PostToolUse output must include hookEventName and use additionalContext rather than Claude's plain-text reminder

hooks.name: require-ai-config-sync.sh
hooks.note: ported as paired Claude/Codex wrappers around bin/ai-config-sync

hooks.name: require-codex-readme-update.sh
hooks.note: Codex README commit gate for Codex integration files; uses lib-codex-hook-json.sh for object-or-string payload normalization.

hooks.name: require-doc-update.sh
hooks.note: ported for Bash git commit gate; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: require-elisp-skill.sh
hooks.note: Depends on Claude Skill PostToolUse markers; Codex has no matching Skill hook event in this setup.

hooks.name: require-elisp-test-before-commit.sh
hooks.note: ported for Bash git commit gate; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: require-elisp-verify-after-commit.sh
hooks.note: ported for Bash post-commit verification gate; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: require-readme-update.sh
hooks.note: ported for Claude config README gate; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: track-elisp-skill.sh
hooks.note: Depends on Claude Skill PostToolUse events; Codex has no matching Skill hook event in this setup.

hooks.name: track-elisp-test.sh
hooks.note: ported for Bash post-tool tracking; Codex side normalizes string-wrapped tool_input/tool_response via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

hooks.name: track-elisp-verify.sh
hooks.note: ported; Codex version accepts exitCode and exit_code payload keys and normalizes string-wrapped tool_input/tool_response via lib-codex-hook-json.sh

registrations.note: Live global Codex instructions symlink points directly to claude/CLAUDE.md because Codex does not apply project_doc_fallback_filenames to $CODEX_HOME.
Mutable live global settings; sync hooks added in place.

Live global Codex hook file is a symlink to the tracked repo file. Codex-only codex-hook-wrapper entries point at the Emacs package source tree because elpaca/builds contains compiled Elisp but not the wrapper script.
Live global Codex config is a symlink to the tracked repo file; trusted project entries and marketplace timestamps are Codex-local and do not have a Claude counterpart; it does not register skills.
Ensures the live ~/.codex/skills directory is a symlink to the tracked codex/skills tree because Codex discovers global skills from ~/.codex/skills/*/SKILL.md.
Codex-only command allowlist rules. There is no Claude counterpart; material policy changes should be recorded here.
